payload.answer: Required eval accounting fields are: (1) token_counts (input, output, total), (2) provider_id and model_id for attribution, (3) estimated_price derived from tokens and pricing, (4) latency percentiles p50/p90/p95 for performance distribution analysis.
payload.decision: Commit structured memory cards defining token accounting, provider/model identification, pricing, and latency percentiles as core eval fields

entity_resolution.reason: Establish durable memory of required eval accounting fields for cost and performance tracking

payload.intent: Document required evaluation accounting fields for cost and latency metrics in Brain memory system

memory_cards.statement: Token counts must be tracked: input tokens, output tokens, and total tokens per request
Provider and model identifiers must be recorded to enable cost attribution and performance analysis by vendor
Estimated price must be calculated and stored based on token counts and provider pricing schedules
Latency percentiles p50, p90, p95 must be tracked to measure response time performance distribution

details: Committed 4 memory cards defining token accounting, provider/model identification, pricing, and latency metrics
Entity resolution created for accounting schema
